"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\car_app.dir/objects.a
C:\PROGRA~1\gcc\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\car_app.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\car_app.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\PROGRA~1\gcc\bin\gcc.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\car_app.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o car_app.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libcar_app.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\car_app.dir\linkLibs.rsp
